entries.content:
Level one shock? Oh, how utterly trivial—like a misbehaving toaster sparking at breakfast. Carry on, dear, and don't forget: a composed smile and soft hands will get you much further than panic or fuss. If things escalate, breathe deeply, tuck in your blouse, and remember that suffering rarely serves more than as a bitter garnish upon the daily stew.
